summary: Phase 1 full flow completed locally without crashes: topic -> keywords -> plan -> approve -> run -> themes -> demo log. The only remaining gap is re-running the same smoke test against a real Facebook login instead of the deterministic browser mock session.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Full flow completed
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db completed run with themes
checks.actual: run-ef54087e18 is DONE with 4 persisted themes

checks.name: CHECK-03: Themes in UI/API
checks.expected: At least 1 theme with sentiment labels
checks.actual: 4 themes returned and all include dominant_sentiment

checks.name: CHECK-05: PII masking across DB
checks.command: Regex scan of crawled_posts.content and theme_results.sample_quotes

checks.name: CHECK-06: Duration < 10 minutes
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db duration query on latest DONE run

checks.name: CHECK-07: DEMO_LOG.md exists
checks.actual: Demo log captured topic, counts, themes, health, duration, and errors
